title: Control Flow
description: if/elif/else, for loops, while loops, and the three patterns that cover most real data tasks.
learning_objectives: Write if/elif/else blocks for business decision logic
Apply for loops to filter, transform, and aggregate data
Decompose a business problem into control flow before writing code
curated_videos: Corey Schafer: Python Tutorial — Conditionals and Booleans
Corey Schafer: Python Tutorial — Loops and Iterations
